scripts.format:check: prettier --check README.md DOCS.md FAQ.md GENERATOR_ARCHITECTURE.md GETTING_STARTED.md GLOSSARY.md HARDWARE_OVERVIEW.md QUALITY_GATE.md REFERENCE_STACK.md STACK_CONFIG.md TROUBLESHOOTING.md schemas/lsh_stack.schema.json .github/workflows/ci.yml .github/workflows/release-pyz.yml .markdownlint-cli2.yaml .prettierrc.json package.json
scripts.lint:md: markdownlint-cli2 README.md DOCS.md FAQ.md GENERATOR_ARCHITECTURE.md GETTING_STARTED.md GLOSSARY.md HARDWARE_OVERVIEW.md QUALITY_GATE.md REFERENCE_STACK.md STACK_CONFIG.md TROUBLESHOOTING.md
scripts.lint:md:fix: markdownlint-cli2 --fix README.md DOCS.md FAQ.md GENERATOR_ARCHITECTURE.md GETTING_STARTED.md GLOSSARY.md HARDWARE_OVERVIEW.md QUALITY_GATE.md REFERENCE_STACK.md STACK_CONFIG.md TROUBLESHOOTING.md
scripts.format:py:check: uv run ruff format --check lsh-stack.py src tests
scripts.lint:py: uv run ruff check lsh-stack.py src tests
scripts.lint:py:fix: uv run ruff check --fix lsh-stack.py src tests
scripts.check:py: npm run format:py:check && npm run lint:py && npm run typecheck && npm run test:py
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint:md && npm run check:py
scripts.fix: npm run format && npm run lint:md:fix && npm run lint:py:fix
